_comment: ai_ops hooks template. Copy content into .claude/settings.local.json at workspace root. Adjust paths to match your workspace layout.

hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.md$'; then npx --yes markdownlint-cli2 "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>&1; fi; exit 0

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(00_Admin/(policies|specs|configs)/|AGENTS\.md|CONTRIBUTING\.md|\.ai_ops/workflows/)'; then echo "[GOVERNANCE GUARD] Level 4 path detected: $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH — verify explicit L4 approval exists before proceeding."; fi; exit 0

echo "{\"additionalContext\": \"Branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo none). Active artifacts: $(grep -c 'type:' ai_ops/.ai_ops/local/work_state.yaml 2>/dev/null || echo 0) in work_state.yaml.\"}"
